name: LucidEvent
description: Lucid event stream — thin append-only log of every meaningful interaction. Powers Customer Intelligence layer in Phase 2.

entity_type.description: Type of entity this event relates to

entity_id.description: ID of the entity that triggered the event

customer_ref.description: Customer reference for cross-entity intelligence joins

sku.description: SKU reference if event is product-related

occurred_at.description: ISO timestamp of when the event actually occurred
